hero.headline: TUNNEL!
hero.subtitle: A contemporary art gallery in public space
hero.tagline: We are transforming the Žižkov Tunnel into a living cultural axis connecting Žižkov, Karlín and Holešovice.

intro.heading: The tunnel as a gallery
intro.p1: The Žižkov Tunnel Association was founded in 2025 with the goal of transforming a predominantly transit space into a curated gallery of contemporary art.
intro.p2: The project brings together architecture, art and public space, creating a new place for residents and visitors of Prague to meet.

vision.label: Vision
vision.heading: A new cultural axis of Prague
vision.item1: A place for art, inspiration and shared experiences.
vision.item2: A new symbol of contemporary Prague.

how.label: How it will work
how.heading: 3 new artworks every year
how.note: Over 10 years, works by Czech and international artists will be installed in the tunnel.

why.label: Why the Žižkov Tunnel?
why.desc0: A unique space with a distinctive atmosphere and historical value.
why.desc1: Thousands of people pass through the tunnel every day, naturally encountering art.
why.desc2: The chance to create a new symbol of contemporary Prague, open to all.

list.name: Martin Wichterle
list.role: Industrialist, owner of the Wikov engineering group and the Bomma and Rückl glassworks

list.name: Jiří Řezák
list.role: Architect and owner of the QARTA Architektura studio

list.name: Jiří Fajt
list.role: Art historian and artistic director, former Director General of the National Gallery in Prague

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Get to know the Žižkov Tunnel

findUs.title: How to Find Us
findUs.address:
Žižkov Tunnel
Prague 3 — Žižkov / Karlín / Holešovice
findUs.entranceZizkov: Entrance from Žižkov: Seifertova street, near Náměstí Winstona Churchilla.
findUs.transport: Public transport: Metro B Florenc, tram Tachovské náměstí or Lipanská.
findUs.mapNote: The tunnel is open daily to pedestrians and cyclists.

meta.title: Žižkov Tunnel — Association
meta.description: Transforming the Žižkov Tunnel into a world-class art gallery. A project connecting Žižkov, Karlín and Holešovice — the cultural axis of Prague.
